narrative:
Edison Village (precinct in Morrow County) has 276 registered voters — a small sample, so the figures below carry meaningful statistical uncertainty. Republican-leaning voters make up 32.2% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 10.5%, a pronounced Republican lean of 21.7 percentage points.
